prompt_text: What's the best anti-aging serum in 2026 according to dermatologists? (FR source: Quel est le meilleur sérum anti-âge en 2026 selon les dermatologues ?)
diagnosis: The target page is a category page with almost no substantive content (0 H2s, no readable prose paragraphs). LLMs find nothing to cite — they prefer 'explainer' pages with ingredients, comparisons, evidence and specific product picks. Very low topical coverage (0%): the page does not cover the topics LLMs expect on this query. Zero brand mentions detected in the analysed chats.
action_items: Add sections for the 6 missing topics identified (see 'Recommended H2 sections').
Study the structure of the competitor pages the LLMs cite (Neutrogena, The Ordinary, La Roche-Posay): content depth, external citations, H2/H3 structure.
Cite 2-3 external authorities (studies, dermatologists, specialist press) inside the copy — LLMs favour sources that themselves cite.
Name active ingredients and their benefits explicitly in the first paragraphs — not only inside product tiles.
